description.value: **`<lyra-activity-feed>`** (default: `16rem`) — Cap on how tall the expanded body grows before it scrolls internally (non-virtualized mode); also sizes the internal virtual-list.
**`<lyra-animated-image>`** — The size of `control-box`. Defaults to `var(--lyra-icon-button-size)`.
**`<lyra-animated-image>`** — The size of the play/pause icons. Defaults to `calc(var(--lyra-icon-button-size) * 0.35)`.
**`<lyra-animated-image>`** — Caps the rendered media's block-size. Defaults to `var(--lyra-size-20rem)`.
**`<lyra-animation>`** (default: `25%`) — Peak lift height of the bounce preset.
**`<lyra-animation>`** (default: `4%`) — Horizontal travel of the shake preset.
**`<lyra-animation>`** (default: `100%`) — Travel distance for the slide-in/slide-out/slide-in-up/slide-in-down presets.
**`<lyra-animation>`** (default: `0.5`) — Starting/ending scale factor for the zoom-in/zoom-out presets.
**`<lyra-attachment-chip>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate upload-spinner rotation. The ambient loop stops under reduced motion.
**`<lyra-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Active bar/waveform color.
**`<lyra-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand-quiet)`) — Inactive/idle color.
**`<lyra-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-16rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized transcript list.

**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-2rem)`) — Sizes the overflow badge to match the slotted avatars. Does not resize the avatars themselves (see class doc) — set a matching `size` on each `<lyra-avatar>` child directly for that.
**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Overflow badge background. Tone-driven; see `tone`.
**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-text)`) — Overflow badge text color. Tone-driven; see `tone`.

**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-neg-6px)`) — Horizontal overlap between consecutive avatars (a logical `margin-inline-start`, so it auto-mirrors under `dir="rtl"`). Setting this to `0` or a positive length is a supported escape hatch that turns the stack into normal, non-overlapping spacing.
**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-surface)`) — The cutout-style ring drawn around every avatar and the overflow badge.
**`<lyra-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lyra-border-width-medium)`) — Ring thickness.
**`<lyra-browser-frame>`** (default: `16 / 9`) — The viewport's aspect ratio.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `0.9875`) — `transform: scale()` factor applied while a non-disabled button is pressed.
**`<lyra-button-group>`** — Gap between grouped controls.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `1.08`) — `filter: brightness()` multiplier applied while hovering a non-disabled button.
**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `1s`) — Rotation period of the `loading` spinner.

**`<lyra-button>`** (default: `100%`) — Inline size of the internal button. The host defaults it to `100%` so the native button follows the host's own width; override to `auto` (or any other value) for a compact inline composition.
**`<lyra-chat-message>`** (default: `80%`) — Maximum inline size of the message bubble.
**`<lyra-checkpoint>`** (default: `1s`) — Duration of one restoring-spinner rotation (stopped under reduced motion).
**`<lyra-chip>`** (default: `var(--lyra-chip-bg)`) — Background while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from its resting background.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Input text size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Selected-tag text size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Selected-tag padding.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Minimum input-container block size.
**`<lyra-combobox>`** — Padding inside the input container.
**`<lyra-contact-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `var(--lyra-font-mono)`) — Font used for plain-text previews.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum body block size before the preview scrolls internally.
**`<lyra-document-preview>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate loading-indicator rotation.
**`<lyra-document-viewer>`** (default: `70vh`) — Maximum block size of the dialog body before it scrolls internally.
**`<lyra-docx-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable document body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-drawer>`** — Block size for top/bottom drawers.
**`<lyra-drawer>`** — Inline size for start/end drawers.
**`<lyra-empty>`** — Cross-axis and text alignment used in compact mode; set to `center` for dense but centered empty states.
**`<lyra-empty>`** (default: `var(--lyra-space-xs)`) — Padding used in compact mode; accepts any padding shorthand (e.g. `8px 2px`).
**`<lyra-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand-quiet)`) — Background color.

**`<lyra-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Text/accent color. Reflected `type` lets a host theme per type from CSS, e.g. `lyra-entity-chip[type='person'] { --lyra-entity-chip-color: ... }`.
**`<lyra-file-icon>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-2rem)`) — Inline/block size of the format badge.
**`<lyra-flag>`** (default: `4 / 3`) — Rectangular flag aspect ratio.
**`<lyra-flag>`** (default: `cover`) — How the image fits its flag frame.
**`<lyra-flag>`** — Rectangular flag corner radius.
**`<lyra-flow-canvas>`** (default: `8px`) — Dotted background spacing.
**`<lyra-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lyra-transition-ambient)`) — Running-edge march animation duration.
**`<lyra-flow-minimap>`** (default: `8rem`) — Map block size.
**`<lyra-flow-minimap>`** (default: `12rem`) — Map inline size.
**`<lyra-flow-node>`** (default: `11rem`) — Minimum card inline size.
**`<lyra-gauge>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Fill stroke for radial, ring, and linear gauges.

**`<lyra-graph>`** — Ordered categorical fallback palette for a typed node with no `GraphNodeType.color`, assigned by the type's index in `nodeTypes` (wraps every 8 entries). Declared centrally in `tokens.styles.ts` so `<lyra-graph>` and any future `<lyra-graph-legend>`- style component resolve the identical default.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-surface)`) — Legibility halo (`stroke`) behind a drawn edge label, painted under the fill via `paint-order: stroke`.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — `focus-halo` stroke color.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Hull fill/stroke color.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `0.12`) — Hull element opacity (composites fill+stroke as one group, avoiding a double-opacity seam at the fill/stroke boundary).
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-success)`) — Selected node/link stroke.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-danger)`) — Border color for an annotated cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-focus-ring-color)`) — Focus ring around a focused cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** — Font for axis/legend labels drawn on the canvas.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-no-data)`) — Fill for cells with no value.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — High endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand-quiet)`) — Low endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-success)`) — Border color for the selected cell.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-surface)`) — Hover tooltip background.
**`<lyra-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-text)`) — Hover tooltip text color.
**`<lyra-lightbox>`** — Background for every floating/toolbar icon button.
**`<lyra-lightbox>`** — Icon/text color paired with `--lyra-lightbox-control-bg`.
**`<lyra-lightbox>`** — The backdrop scrim color.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Default link stroke, overridden per-link by a link's own `color`.
**`<lyra-lite-chart>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Stroke for a bar/point whose category index is in `selectedIndex`.
**`<lyra-mind-map>`** (default: `6rem`) — Radius step per depth ring.
**`<lyra-graph>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Default node fill, overridden per-node by `GraphNode.color`.
**`<lyra-notebook-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-dropdown>`, `<lyra-popover>`** — Maximum inline size of the popup (default `--lyra-size-20rem`).
**`<lyra-page-rail>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-24rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized rail.
**`<lyra-pagination>`** — Control inline/block size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lyra-pagination>`** — Control font size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lyra-pdf-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-24rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized page list.
**`<lyra-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-surface)`) — Light/background module color, including the quiet zone.
**`<lyra-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-text)`) — Dark/foreground module color.
**`<lyra-random-content>`** (default: `300ms`) — Duration of the entrance animation.
**`<lyra-random-content>`** (default: `ease`) — Easing function for the entrance animation.
**`<lyra-random-content>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-0-5em)`) — Translation distance for directional animations.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Unfilled-star color.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-warning)`) — Filled-star color.
**`<lyra-rating>`** (default: `var(--lyra-font-size-xl)`) — Star size.
**`<lyra-segmented>`, `<lyra-tabs>`** (default: `2rem`) — Width of the static fade at each horizontal scroll edge.
**`<lyra-scroller>`** — Control size.
**`<lyra-scroller>`** — Minimum vertical scroller size.
**`<lyra-span-waterfall>`** (default: `8rem`) — Width of the name gutter column.
**`<lyra-span-waterfall>`** — Animation duration for a `running` span's striped bar; defaults to `--lyra-transition-ambient`.
**`<lyra-sparkline>`** (default: `0.15`) — Fill opacity of the area under the line (type="area").
**`<lyra-sparkline>`** (default: `1.5`) — Stroke width of the line/area path.
**`<lyra-svg-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0px`) — Blur radius of that same ring. 0 by default (a crisp ring); set a real length (e.g. 0.4rem) for a soft glow instead.
**`<lyra-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — Ring color drawn around the selected swatch, themeable independently of the focus ring and every other ring color.

**`<lyra-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0s`) — Duration of a rhythmic brighten-and-settle "shine" on the selected swatch. `0s` (the default) is a no-op -- today's static look for every existing consumer. Set a real duration (e.g. 1.6s) for a pulsing shine; disabled outright under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Independent of `--lyra-swatch-picker-selected-blur` (a separate `filter: brightness()` animation, not `box-shadow`), so the two compose freely, and works identically for a plain color circle and an icon swatch alike.
**`<lyra-table>`** (default: `0.12`) — Hover/focus opacity of the resize handle.
**`<lyra-table>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-3rem)`) — Default minimum width for a resizable column without an explicit pixel `minWidth`.
**`<lyra-task-list>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-status icon spin animation duration/timing.
**`<lyra-textarea>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum auto-grown block size before the textarea scrolls.

**`<lyra-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lyra-space-l)`) — Spacing between consecutive items along the timeline's main axis; also the length each item's own rail visually bridges to reach the next item's marker. Declared here but actually consumed inside each `<lyra-timeline-item>`'s own stylesheet, via ordinary CSS custom-property inheritance across the slot boundary.

**`<lyra-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-text-quiet)`) — Marker fill/accent color. Swapped per `variant` (see the class doc's variant table); a consumer overriding this directly on one item wins over the variant default via normal CSS cascade/specificity.
**`<lyra-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lyra-size-1-25rem)`) — Diameter of the marker circle (both inline-size and block-size, so the default dot stays circular).

**`<lyra-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-border)`) — Color of the connecting rail line. A component-scoped property (not just inlining `var(--lyra-color-border)` at every use site) so a consumer can retint just the rail without touching the library-wide border color elsewhere.
**`<lyra-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lyra-border-width-medium)`) — Thickness of the connecting rail line.
**`<lyra-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-icon animation duration and timing.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** — Insets for the maximized panel.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop color.
**`<lyra-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-status animation duration and timing.
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Tooltip background color (default `--lyra-color-neutral`).
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Tooltip text color (default `--lyra-color-on-neutral`).
**`<lyra-tooltip>`** — Maximum inline size of the tooltip (default `--lyra-size-20rem`).
**`<lyra-tour>`** — Backdrop scrim fill. Defaults to `--lyra-color-overlay`.
**`<lyra-tour>`** — Maximum popover inline size. Defaults to `--lyra-size-22rem`.
**`<lyra-tour>`** — Corner radius shared by the cutout and the ring. Defaults to `--lyra-radius`.
**`<lyra-tour>`** — Spotlight ring color. Defaults to `--lyra-color-brand`.
**`<lyra-tour>`** — Spotlight ring thickness. Defaults to `--lyra-border-width-medium`.

**`<lyra-chat-message>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Streaming-indicator animation duration and timing function.

**`<lyra-skeleton>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by the pulse and sheen effects.

**`<lyra-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Pending-icon pulse duration and timing.

**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by all variants.
**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `600ms`) — Delay for the second dot in the dots variant.
**`<lyra-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1200ms`) — Delay for the third dot in the dots variant.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-brand)`) — First entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-success)`) — Second entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-warning)`) — Third entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-danger)`) — Fourth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-1)`) — Fifth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-2)`) — Sixth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-3)`) — Seventh entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lyra-color-chart-4)`) — Eighth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lyra-xml-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lyra-zoomable-frame>`** — Minimum viewport block size.
